rules.cssText: .container.cc-nav-dropdown-header { background-color: var(--colors--background); flex-flow: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; display: flex; position: relative; }

.nav-link { font-size: var(--_typography---subheading-xl--font-size); justify-content: space-between; width: 100%; height: auto; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; padding-top: 0.5em; padding-bottom: 0.5em; display: flex; }

.nav-link.cc-dropdown-btn.cc-settings { border-radius: var(--_components---button--border-radius); background-color: var(--colors--secondary-background); color: var(--colors--text-secondary); font-size: var(--_typography---paragraph-body--font-size); font-variation-settings: "wght" 400; padding-left: 0.75em; padding-right: 0.75em; }

.nav-menu { padding-top: var(--_components---nav--height); background-color: var(--colors--background); scrollbar-width: thin; scrollbar-color: var(--colors--primary-accent)var(--colors--secondary-background); width: 100vw; height: 100dvh; position: absolute; inset: 0%; overflow: hidden auto; }

.nav-dropdown_content.cc-mega.w--open { z-index: 3; background-color: var(--colors--background); width: 100%; height: 100svh; max-height: none; padding-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 12rem; position: fixed; inset: auto 0% 0%; overflow: hidden auto; }

.nav-dropdown_content.cc-mega.cc-js { z-index: 3; gap: 16px; background-color: var(--colors--background); border-top-style: none; grid-template-rows: auto auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; width: 100%; height: 100dvh; max-height: none; padding-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 12rem; display: none; position: fixed; top: auto; bottom: 0px; }
.nav-menu_btn:focus-visible, .nav-menu_btn[data-wf-focus-visible] { outline-color: var(--colors--primary-accent); outline-offset: 0px; outline-width: 2px; outline-style: solid; }

.nav-menu_container { border-top-style: solid; border-top-width: 1px; border-top-color: var(--colors--border); scrollbar-width: thin; flex-flow: column; width: 100%; height: 100%; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; padding: 1rem 4% 11rem; overflow: auto; }
.sticky-img_link_wrap { visibility: visible; clip-path: none; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: stretch; width: 100%; height: auto; max-height: 92vw; margin-left: 0px; }
.g-footer-brand { width: 100%; max-width: none; position: relative; right: 0%; }
.g-footer-brand.cc-minimal-footer { width: 100%; max-width: 100%; height: auto; bottom: auto; }
.g-footer-copyright { flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; }
.e-mail { border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: rgb(0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 1px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.75) 0px 1px 1px 1px, rgb(0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 2px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5) 56px 56px 70px; }

.nav-menu_mobile-ctas { z-index: 4; padding-top: var(--_layout---grid--gap-sm); padding-bottom: var(--_layout---grid--gap-sm); border-top: 1px solid var(--colors--border); background-color: var(--colors--background); flex-flow: column; justify-content: center; align-items: stretch; height: 9rem; margin-top: auto; display: flex; position: absolute; inset: auto 0% 0%; }

.nav-dropdown_mobile-header { z-index: 2; height: var(--_components---nav--height); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--colors--border); background-color: var(--colors--background); display: flex; position: sticky; top: 0px; }

.nav-dropdown_mobile-header_back-btn { border-radius: var(--_components---button--border-radius); background-color: var(--colors--background); justify-content: center; align-items: center; padding: 0px 0.5rem; font-size: 1.6rem; display: flex; position: absolute; left: 0%; }
.sticky-sidebar { min-height: 0px; padding-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; position: relative; top: auto; }
.inspo_grid-wrapper { flex-direction: row; order: -1; width: 100%; min-height: 200px; position: static; }
.legend-list.u-mb-32 { gap: 1rem 2rem; flex-flow: wrap; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; }

.integrations_sidebar { border: 1px solid rgb(216, 216, 216); border-radius: 4px; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.g-modal-image { justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; height: auto; }
.g-modal_box { flex-direction: column-reverse; justify-content: flex-end; height: auto; min-height: 100vh; max-height: none; display: flex; }
.g-modal_box.experiment { flex-direction: column-reverse; grid-template-columns: 1fr; justify-content: flex-end; height: auto; min-height: 100vh; max-height: none; }

.g-modal-image-img.cc-tablet { width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; inset: 0% auto auto 0%; }

.floating-frame-card.cc-02 { margin-bottom: var(--_layout---spacing--margin-lg); width: 100%; max-width: 100%; position: relative; inset: 0px; }

.survey-quote-wrap { column-gap: var(--_layout---spacing--margin-md); row-gap: var(--_layout---spacing--margin-md); aspect-ratio: auto; flex-flow: column; display: flex; }
.simple-tabs_menu.cc-multiple { margin-bottom: var(--_layout---spacing--margin-sm); justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-end; overflow: auto; }

.flow-tv_hero-inner { text-align: center; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }

.autoplay-tabs_menu { column-gap: var(--_layout---spacing--margin-md); row-gap: var(--_layout---spacing--margin-md); flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: stretch; }
.autoplay-tabs_stage { margin-top: var(--_layout---grid--gap-md); display: block; position: relative; }
.g-footer-list { gap: 1rem; grid-template-rows: auto auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; display: grid; }
.g-footer-list.cc-social { column-gap: 1.5rem; flex-direction: row; margin-bottom: 0px; display: flex; }
.dropdown_list.cc-desktop-show { padding-top: var(--_layout---spacing--margin-xs); opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; display: block; position: absolute; inset: auto 0% auto auto; }
.grid-4-col { column-gap: var(--_layout---grid--gap-xs); row-gap: var(--_layout---grid--gap-xs); grid-template-columns: minmax(0px, 1fr) minmax(0px, 1fr); }

.dropdown_list-inner.cc-developers-subnav { padding-right: var(--_components---button--horizontal-padding); padding-left: var(--_components---button--horizontal-padding); border-style: solid none; border-radius: 0px; }
.compare-grid { grid-template-rows: auto auto auto auto; grid-template-areas: ". . . ." ". . . ." ". . . ." ". . . ."; }
.stat1_center { flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; padding-bottom: 2rem; padding-left: 2rem; padding-right: 2rem; }
.hover-features_visual { max-width: 100%; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; display: block; position: relative; }

.pricing-table-row { border-right: 1px solid var(--colors--border); border-radius: 0px; flex-wrap: wrap; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-flow: row; }
.pricing-table-cell.cc-left-col { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--colors--border); border-left-style: solid; flex: 0 0 auto; width: 100%; min-width: auto; max-width: none; }
.pricing-table-cell.cc-bordered { justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 33.3333%; font-size: 0.875rem; display: flex; }
